tables.name: boxes
tables.label: Wireframe blocks
tables.description: UI blocks (screen frame, nav, button, input, text, image, list, section): drag to place, resize from the corner, tap to edit label + note.

tables.name: links
tables.label: Wireframe links
tables.description: Optional arrows between wireframe blocks (navigation: 'tapping this goes to that').

tables.name: flow_nodes
tables.label: Flow steps
tables.description: Flowchart / data-flow steps: start, step, decision, data, end.

tables.name: flow_edges
tables.label: Flow arrows
tables.description: Arrows between flow steps (the path the process takes).

tables.name: brief
tables.label: Request
tables.description: The overall ask: new applet or a change, a title and a summary. One row.

tables.name: features
tables.label: Features & changes
tables.description: What you want — features, changes, fixes, questions — each optionally pinned to a screen/block, with a priority.

tables.name: data_model
tables.label: Data model
tables.description: The data/schema: entities, their fields, and relationships.

tables.name: model_fields
tables.label: Fields
tables.description: Typed columns for each data table: name + type (text/number/date/bool/choice/link) + options + required. The real schema the app is built from.

tables.name: notes
tables.label: Notes
tables.description: Running design discussion — you and Claude both write here.

tables.name: drawings
tables.label: Sketches
tables.description: Freehand vector sketches and dev drawings for anything blocks can't say.

tables.name: sketch
tables.label: Wireframe sketch
tables.description: Freehand annotations drawn over the wireframe (one row).

tables.name: wires
tables.label: Behavior wiring
tables.description: What each visual element DOES: connects a block to a backend action (adds/edits/deletes a row, writes a field, filters a list, opens a screen) on a data table.

tables.name: demo_items
tables.label: Try-it items
tables.description: A scratch table for the Logic tab's live demo — Add item inserts a row; Fill example data asks the local model to populate it.

tables.name: suggestions
tables.label: Model suggestions
tables.description: Next-step ideas drafted by the local model from your design (request + data model + fields + features).
